prompt: Minimalist logo on pure black background. Horizontal composition, two elements side by side. LEFT ELEMENT: A yellow (#FAFA00) rectangular border/frame, portrait orientation (slightly taller than wide). The frame has thick sharp yellow borders with solid black fill inside. Inside the frame, exactly TWO large white capital letter M characters placed side by side horizontally reading 'MM' on ONE line. CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY: The typeface must be a WIDE, EXTENDED, HEAVY sans-serif like Helvetica Neue Black Extended or Eurostile Bold Extended — NOT condensed, NOT narrow, NOT Impact. The letters are WIDE and BLOCKY with thick horizontal and vertical strokes, large counters, plenty of breathing room. The M letterforms are as wide as they are tall. The MM fills about 80% of the frame width. RIGHT ELEMENT: To the right of the yellow frame, the word 'AGENCY.' in the EXACT SAME wide extended heavy sans-serif font — wide letterforms, thick strokes, NOT condensed or narrow. The period at the end is a small yellow (#FAFA00) square dot. The word AGENCY is vertically centered with the frame. CRITICAL: Wide extended typeface throughout, NOT condensed. Only TWO letter Ms inside the frame. Sharp 90-degree corners on frame. No rounded corners. No shadows. No gradients. Clean flat vector graphic design. Ultra sharp edges, perfect geometry, professional quality.
